sections.title: Project Types and Templates

sections.desc: Edit Video bay — multi-track timeline + large preview, in LoadStudio purple.

sections.title: Visual Editor
sections.desc: Expanded mobile creator edit tools.

sections.title: Title and Text Tools
sections.desc: Create production text elements.

sections.title: Character Studio
sections.desc: Create, edit, preserve and export fictional talent.

sections.title: Character Consistency
sections.desc: Strict, moderate and loose consistency with preserved identity controls.

sections.desc: Assign saved fictional talent to projects, scenes, roles, wardrobe and voices.

sections.title: Performance Controls
sections.desc: Control fictional character performances per scene.

sections.title: Image Prompt Studio
sections.desc: Build image prompts from scenes, books, manuscripts or uploaded images.

sections.title: Help and Guided Tour
sections.desc: Step-by-step help for non-technical workflows.

sections.title: Lip Sync Studio
sections.desc: Animate a still photo with synced audio. Upload a portrait and audio, then generate a talking-photo when a local provider is connected.

sections.title: World Builder
sections.desc: Lock the rules, physics, history, geography, and culture of your production world. Saves locally and feeds Director AI prompts.

sections.title: Rights and Credits
sections.desc: Manage ownership, license, source material, and credits for this production. Exports rights.json and credits.json.

sections.title: Media Vault
sections.desc: All production media in one place — images, video, audio, music, SFX, subtitles. Every asset carries license and rights metadata.

sections.title: CinePWA Package Builder
sections.desc: Package production into a portable offline CinePWA with scenes, characters, rights, voices, and assets.

sections.title: Load Eco Infrastructure
sections.desc: Shared provider registry, pipeline routing, and asset registry for Load Studio and Load Play.
